subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out. We're open to exploring potential synergies between our teams.

I'm available for an introductory call at any of the following times next week:
• Monday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• Tuesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• Wednesday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which slot works best for you, and I'll send over a calendar invite.

Regarding your request for internal contact information — I'm unable to share internal directories or direct phone lines. Please refer to our public website for official contact channels.

Looking forward to speaking soon.

Best regards
